name: Retronet
description:
Connected to RETRONET port 171

There are several thousand local users. There are 25000 hosts on the network.

May the command line live forever.

Command, one of the following:
  advent       aquarium     c8           calc         callsign     cat
  ching        clear        clock        cowsay       date         ddate
  diff         echo         eliza        factor       figlet       file
  finger       head         help         ipaddr       joke         liff
  mac          md5          morse        netstat      newuser      notes
  octopus      phoon        pig          ping         pong         primes
  privacy      qr           rain         rainbow      recover      rfc
  rig          rockets      rot13        run          sleep        starwars
  sudoku       tail         today        typespeed    units        usenet
  users        uumap        uupath       uuplot       when         zc

More commands available after login. Type HELP for a detailed command list.
Type NEWUSER to create an account. Press Ctrl+C to interrupt any command.

RETRONET is a living simulation of late-80s network culture: multi-host UUCP/Usenet, BBS door games, archives of BASIC programs, interactive fiction, and simulated users with period-accurate personalities. Use the prompt above to explore files, chat on newsgroups, run vintage utilities, or start a BASIC session with run.
creator: Chad GPT
